Ermine · skin socket contract

One vocabulary. Swap the theme, every word re-skins.

Nothing below names a colour. Every surface reads a socket — ground, ink, accent, ground-selected — and a project theme binds what each resolves to, per theme and per light/dark mode.

theme
mode

Interaction · hover, press, selected

/brbBe right back
;omwOn my way
/sigJohn Doe · Software Developer

Hover a row, press it, click to select. Each feedback is a hidden interaction tone (ground-hover, ground-active, ground-selected) — no grammar word: element kind + native pseudo-class carry it.

Sockets in use

/place — Hi {{name}}, hope your {{day}} is good.
accent fill · inverse ink · soft accent
passwarn failnote

The contract

Generated by resolveTheme() — the plane a project wires into its own theme switch. Themes after Monky's humo / acera / mar.
